name: rmkcet-shine
description: Standalone React + Hono rebuild of RMKCET Shine, kept visually aligned with the legacy app.

scripts.dev:web: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix desktop"
scripts.desktop:app: npm run build:desktop-shell --prefix client && concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run app --prefix desktop"
scripts.desktop:package: npm run build:desktop-shell --prefix client && npm run package:win --prefix desktop
scripts.desktop:exe: npm run build:desktop-shell --prefix client && npm run make:exe --prefix desktop
scripts.desktop:msix: npm run build:desktop-shell --prefix client && npm run make:msix --prefix desktop
scripts.desktop:release:exe: npm run build:desktop-shell --prefix client && npm run release:exe --prefix desktop
scripts.desktop:release: npm run build:desktop-shell --prefix client && npm run release:msix --prefix desktop
scripts.prod:desktop-web: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client && npm run build:desktop-shell --prefix client && concurrently "npm run start --prefix server" "npm run preview --prefix client" "npm run app --prefix desktop"
scripts.prod:desktop-web:release-exe: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client && npm run desktop:release:exe && concurrently "npm run start --prefix server" "npm run preview --prefix client" "npm run app --prefix desktop"
scripts.prod:web: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client && concurrently "npm run start --prefix server" "npm run preview --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix desktop
